subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ard-i-Ba
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who hath honoured the Land of Bá through the presence of Him round Whom all names revolve.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن تشرف ارض الباء بقدوم من طاف حوله الاسماء بذلک بشرت الذرات کل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @humility; meekness; lowliness
